# NEUVIE Nutrition

> Fast-dissolving wellness strips for energy, sleep, beauty, and gut health. Clinically studied ingredients, made in the USA, free US shipping over $50.

NEUVIE makes 30-second dissolving supplement strips designed as a daily ritual. Each strip absorbs sublingually for up to 5x faster delivery than pills. Manufactured in FDA-registered US facilities, third-party tested, non-GMO.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Brand overview and bestselling strips.
- [Shop](/shop): All 13 wellness strips, filterable by goal.
- [Bundles](/bundles): Curated multi-strip bundles up to 25% off.
- [Science](/science): Ingredients, sublingual absorption research, third-party testing.
- [About](/about): Founder story and brand mission.
- [FAQs](/faqs): Common questions on strips, shipping, and ingredients.
- [Contact](/contact): Customer support (team@tryneuvie.com).
- [Shipping](/shipping): US shipping policy and delivery times.
- [Returns](/returns): 14-day money-back guarantee details.

- [Best Vitamin Strips for Hangover Recovery](/blog/best-vitamin-strips-for-hangover): B-complex, electrolytes, and antioxidants for the morning after.
